name: Hacktool Ruler Detected
description: Detects the use of the "Ruler" hacktool, often associated with exploiting Exchange Web Services (EWS). It looks for specific event patterns on a Windows Server (likely a Domain Controller).

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the authentication event.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The user name associated with the authentication attempt.

parameters.name: logon_type
parameters.description: The logon type if available in the event logs.
